opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Destroyed couch → showroom sofa for $47 (pet hair gone in 60 sec)
opportunities.before_state: Faded, hair-covered, stained couch that guests judge the moment they walk in
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, fitted, hair-free sofa that looks freshly purchased — waterproof and machine washable
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season peaks in May, driving a surge in pet-hair furniture searches and impulse buys from frustrated pet owners.

opportunities.specific_product: 2-tier expandable under-sink cabinet organizer with pull-out drawer
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaos under the sink → spa-clean storage for $28
opportunities.before_state: Leaking bottles, random trash bags, and mystery gunk crammed under the bathroom or kitchen sink
opportunities.after_state: Color-coded, tiered, fully visible storage where every product has a home and nothing falls over
opportunities.why_now: Post-spring-cleaning momentum keeps bathroom and kitchen organization in peak search volume through mid-May, with 'under sink' specifically trending on organization Reels.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia rotating bamboo kitchen tool holder with utensil set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Cluttered countertop drawer → chef kitchen for $34
opportunities.before_state: Overflowing utensil drawer that takes 30 seconds to find a spatula and embarrasses you during dinner parties
opportunities.after_state: Rotating counter organizer displaying matching tools like a Williams Sonoma showroom — functional and aesthetic
opportunities.why_now: Cottagecore and clean-kitchen aesthetics are driving high engagement on kitchen organization Reels, with bamboo organizers outperforming plastic alternatives in saves and shares.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products mid-century modern accent chair
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dead corner → designer reading nook for $129
opportunities.before_state: Bare, wasted bedroom or living room corner that collects laundry and looks unfinished in every photo
opportunities.after_state: Styled reading nook with accent chair, throw, and lamp — the exact aesthetic flooding Pinterest and home Reels
opportunities.why_now: The 'dead corner makeover' format is one of the top-performing Reel hooks in May 2026, and Best Choice Products chairs hit the sub-$150 impulse-buy sweet spot.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper adjustable pillow with cutout design
opportunities.transformation_hook: Waking up with neck pain → best sleep of your life for $89
opportunities.before_state: Flat, shapeless pillow that leaves side sleepers with a stiff neck, shoulder tension, and groggy mornings
opportunities.after_state: Ergonomic, adjustable-fill pillow with shoulder cutout that aligns the spine and delivers 8 hours of actual rest
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for side sleepers neck pain
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content spikes in late spring as viewers link poor sleep to daytime fatigue, and the shoulder-cutout design gives the Reel a concrete visual hook most pillow content lacks.
